TextENGNew: "Yo! I'm back~♪"
"Oh, welcome back.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1113. ...What happened to your hair?"
"Well, the school store proved to be a more fierce battlefield than expected.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1220. It was hard enough just to buy some bread with everyone pushing each other around."
As I said that, I flattened my bangs that were frayed in the rush through the crowd.
Looking more closely, my lovely pigtails had come undone. It's a hassle, but I'll have to fix them later.
...Or better yet, maybe I should just untie it and let it down straight?
Maybe an image change would be just as popular for me as it was for Natsumi. ...But I doubt it.

"Come to think of it, the cafeteria is closed today because of the water supply inspection.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1115. If all the kids who normally relied on that flooded the store, it really would turn into a battlefield."

"...Sheesh. I knew about that, and that's why I sprinted there the moment the bell rang!@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1222. At least, that's what I was planning to do.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1223. But that bastard Taniguchi in the modern Japanese class made me lose time by going on and on about boring trivia~."
"Now now.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1117. ...Anyway, let's eat."
"Okay.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1225. ...Huh?"
Just then, I noticed that there were two fewer seats around our circle of desks than usual.
Tamako quickly noticed my confusion and spoke up while opening her lunchbox.

"Akira-chan is staying in the art room during lunch break to put the finishing touches on an assignment.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1119. And Natsumi offered to "help" him, so she's having lunch in the art room too."
I tersely sat the bread and the drink I bought down on the desk, then took a seat directly across from Tamako.
...It felt like someone had thrown a bucket of cold water over me, but I decided to ignore it.
Come to think of it, it's been a while since we've had lunch with just the two of us. Probably not since Natsumi was out sick last fall.
"I really lose my stride when I have nobody to tease.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1228. You play the straight-man too well, Tamako-chan, so that makes it hard for me."
"...What, were you looking to start a fight?"
Tamako made a disgruntled expression, but she quickly forced a smile and shrugged her shoulders. It seemed like she was feeling the same discomfort.

"At first I was worried about what might happen between the two of them... but it seems like they're doing very well.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1122. Akira-chan said that they went out to the city together last Saturday to buy art supplies."
"Saturday, huh...?"
I gave her a vague nod while stabbing the straw into my drink.
...And the contents spilled out a bit because I was squeezing the carton too tight.
"Huh?@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1124. Is something wrong, Chisato?"

"No, well, it's no big deal...@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1231. I invited her to hang out on Saturday, but she turned me down.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1232. I figured she already had plans, but I wish she would've said so."

"That's just a coincidence.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1126. ...Plus, do you really think you could say the same if you were in her shoes?@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1127. "I made plans with the guy I love."@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1128. Sounds a little awkward when you think about it like that."
"Hmm... yeah, I suppose."
It's true that if she had told me, I would've pried and asked more, being a bit of a bother. Especially if it was just for a mundane little errand.
...No, that's not all.
This is Natsumi. She probably felt bad about prioritizing a date with her boyfriend over my invitation... so maybe that made it hard for her to say it directly.
I'm grateful for the sentiment... but the fact that she was keeping secrets instead of just talking to me honestly didn't feel good.

"...And it's not like I would've stopped her if she told me that the two of us would be on our own this lunch break.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1235. We're officially friends, so we should have a more blunt relationship."
"She can't do that. It's just her personality.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1130. You should already know that."
"Haah, she reads way too far into things.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1237. Geez..."
"One correction though. Natsumi hasn't been completely silent.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1132. She was actually waiting here to talk to you, up until just a little while ago."
"...Oh really?"
"You read too far into things, too.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1134. But, I do understand how you must feel."
I awkwardly slurped at my fruit-flavored milk to ease that sore point.
...It's true that I have a tendency to worry a lot and overthink things, even I know that. Maybe it's because I haven't had as many opportunities to talk with Natsumi lately.
I don't think it's jealousy. ...At least, I want to believe that. And I really am genuinely worried about her wellbeing.
(Even so...)
It wasn't that she was oblivious to her charm... but I couldn't help but feel frustrated by her excessive lack of confidence.
Can I really go out with him?
Am I allowed to enjoy this happiness?
...Her facial expressions and attitude made it clear she had those concerns, which would make us laugh if she asked us about them.
(It's obviously fine, right?@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1242. But when it comes to that girl...)
Even so, I thought that once her love was reciprocated, she'd gain confidence in herself and her awkwardness would disappear.
...But unfortunately, that thought was way off the mark.
Even now, Natsumi still can't fully accept the idea... that happiness is something appropriate for her to have.
And, what's worse...
"...Isn't she getting carried away?"
"She's been in really high spirits lately... for a country bumpkin."
We caught wind of that mean-spirited gossip popping up here and there.
Of course they'd be jealous. Despite Natsumi's attitude, people were envious of her sudden surge in popularity within the class, so some girls were whining about it.
But, Natsumi must've heard it too... She never speaks up about it, but she's definitely bothered by it. ...A lot.
Is that proof that she's afraid of even us feeling jealous or hateful...? Her bad habit of feeling overly suspicious has already started to pop up again.
And that may have been part of the reason she turned down my invitation...
"At the very least... I wish she would talk to us.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1244. We've talked about plenty of things and understood each other. We've always been trying to help."
"Right.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1136. But now, it feels like no matter what we say, it won't reach Natsumi."
"In the end, only you can give yourself confidence.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1138. It may seem cold, but I think this is a problem she'll have to solve for herself."
"...Yeah, maybe so."
It was just as Tamako said. Confidence isn't something you can gain just because of other people talking to you.
All we can do is... well, just watch over her. And be ready to grab her hand any time she holds it out, asking for help.
But, there's still a chance that's not enough.
If that were to come to pass, what should we do...?
"At any rate... it seems like things are going to get boring in the future."
"In the future...?"
"With Natsumi and Akira.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1248. From now on, I think the two of them will be spending a lot more time together, and that means less time for us with Natsumi."
"...I'm happy that they're enjoying their time together, but I'm worried that the three of us will never be able to go out together like we used to."
"You're exaggerating..."
Tamako tried to laugh it off... but it seemed she could sense something from the look on my face.
She donned a slightly more gentle expression, and looked at me with concern.
"...What's that, Chisato?@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1142. Haven't you already gotten over it?"

"Yeah, no worries on that particular subject.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1251. It's already been sorted out, and I have no regrets about the outcome.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1252. ...Even Mamoru-senpai is comforting me about it."
"Oh my, now it's getting interesting."
"Come on, it's not like that.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1254. I mean, umm..."
How do I explain this feeling?
Jealousy?
Envy?
No, that's not what this is. ...If anything, I'd dare to say it's "loneliness."

"Choosing your boyfriend over your friends.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1256. I mean, thinking about it, that's a perfectly natural choice.@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1257. But the three of us always had such a great time together... so it feels a bit lonely to think we're losing that."
"I wonder if this is how a father feels as he walks the bride down the aisle...?"
"...You're not walking anyone anywhere.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1145. But I do understand how you feel.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1146. In fact... I feel the same way."
Tamako pulled out a bottle as she said that, then filled a spare cup to the brim with barley tea and held it out to me.
Up until now, Natsumi was always the one giving me tea.
Nobody ever asked her to do that, she just did it naturally, and I took it for granted... It was a little strange.
"It's complicated.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1148. They say you only really notice the things that are important after they're gone... but in the end, I feel lonely too."

"I truly did want to make her dreams come true... but to be honest, sometimes I think it might've been better to wait a little longer.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1150. Because I also enjoyed the time the three of us spent together."
"Tamako..."
"Still, things can't stay the same forever.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1152. Even when it would be best for things to never change... that's impossible."

"You have to think of your lover first and foremost, even if you feel sorry for others.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1154. So, I think it would be best for us to keep our distance and avoid interfering with their relationship and time together."
"...But honestly, I'm not sure the best way to act as a friend under these circumstances."
The nice thing about having long-time friends... is that they're able to sense my innermost dark emotions and put them into words.
Maybe Tamako herself didn't think that deeply about it. She's flexible to an extent, and can adapt to fit any circumstances... that's the kind of girl she is.
...But, I think about these things. At least, it appears that way to her.
"...Haah."
I let out a sigh. ...It felt like I was being immature.
It was so much easier when it was just the three of us getting along.
It would be nice if we could just talk to each other about our thoughts and feelings, pointing out the pros and cons to one another.
But, since Natsumi found someone more precious than a friend... I no longer understood.
Wouldn't it be rude to step in, make a big fuss, and push things around?
If we push too hard based on our own circumstances, wouldn't that just be making even more trouble for her?
...These are different worries than before, ones I never had to consider because I wasn't near any such romantic situations.
We don't yet have the necessary experience to come up with a clear answer... Right now, we're just going around in circles, thinking of a solution to this confusing and frustrating problem.
(Besides...)
Whenever I see that girl up close, things are still good.
But if, by some chance, the "secret" I've been hiding from her were to come out... I'm not sure what I'd do.
If I just butted in and disregarded her boyfriend while meddling in her affairs, she'd probably get suspicious...
I couldn't think of any good ideas. Nothing felt right. I deeply regretted my inability to do anything.
"So, what should we do?"

"Chisato.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1158. ...If you wanted to make this whole thing "go away" you know there's still a chance to make that happen even now?@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1159. Between you and Natsumi, if someone were to ask which of you I'd side with... it would be you."
"What...? What do you mean by that?"
"Exactly what I said.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1161. Or do you need me to spell it out directly?"
...Tamako's gentle voice sounded like the whispers of the devil.
Right... if we wanted to make the whole situation "go away," it would actually be quite simple. For example, we could directly ask Natsumi if her friends or boyfriend were more important.
If we did that, then knowing how timid and overly dependent she is, I'm sure she'd set her own personal feelings aside and give us priority, reverting to our original relationship.
But... that would be far too cruel. An excessively foul tactic.
And in the first place, I can't just take Natsumi's current happiness from her... There's no way I could do something like that...!
"...@k@vS14/37/VT4Bb_chisa1267.That was just a joke, right?"
"Yeah, just a joke."
*bang*
A terrifying chill ran through my entire body that instant, making me feel weak enough to collapse on the spot.
"C-come on, Tama-san..."
"Ahaha, sorry.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1164. But even if our manner of speaking differs... I'm sure that I'm feeling the same unease that you are, Chisato."
"...Somehow, things have gotten awkward since she started dating Akira-chan.@k@vS14/38/VT4Bb_tama1166. To be honest, I do feel a bit stressed out about it..."
"Well..."
Her assessment was spot on... so I couldn't laugh it off or get angry about it.
...Happy, but also stressed?
I didn't want to overthink things, but I liked it better before... It was completely absurd.
I suddenly let out an unpleasant sigh. ...Even though everyone should be super happy... I'm feeling stressed, and I'm sure Natsumi is too.
What can I do to purge these nasty thoughts from my heart and clear my mind...?
"Somehow... it would be really convenient if I could take some medicine to feel high at times like these."
"Come on, don't say anything rash."
"It doesn't sound like a joke when you say it."
"Hmm? Oh, right."
Whoops, I forgot what sort of business my family is involved with.
Stress, huh?
If a drug like that really existed in the world, could it solve all these problems?
Or, would it do the opposite...?
I wiped the sweat from my forehead with a handkerchief.
With the curtains closed, the art room was wrapped in a damp heat at lunch time.
Two fans in the corner of the room were letting out a quiet humming sound.
The smell of oil and paint wafted over with the breeze.
...With the room in that state, the intermittent sounds of Akira-kun's breathing and brushstrokes echoed throughout the room.
Akira-kun was staring at the canvas with unwavering focus.
He had an incredible level of concentration. My very existence may have temporarily vanished from his mind.
Looking across the canvas, his face was serious and very fearless... It was really cool.
And that amazing person is my boyfriend...
I felt shy and embarrassed while thinking that... but more than that, my heart was filled with warmth and happiness.
"...@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1122.Alright, maybe that's good...?"
Before long, Akira-kun sat his fine-detail brush down and let out a sigh.
And at the same time, the tension and the overwhelmingly heavy air that filled the room dispersed without a trace, giving my heart a sense of release.
"Akira-kun, are you all done?"
"Yeah.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1124. Anything more would be superfluous, so I think I'll keep it like this.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1125. ...Oh."
Akira-kun noticed the lunch box next to me as he said that, and said "whoops" while turning toward the clock on the wall.
...Only 20 minutes before the end of lunch break.
He started by saying he should do a little bit of work before lunch... but in the end, he couldn't stop working his brush and went on for over 30 minutes.
"S-sorry, Kimiyoshi...!@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1127. I got totally absorbed..."
"It's okay.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1318. It wouldn't feel right to eat lunch until it's done, right?"
"But, now there's no time to buy anything..."
"It's all right, just a sec."
I stood up with a smile on my face as I said that. And then, I opened the lid on one of the lunch boxes sitting on the desk next to Akira-kun.
...The inside was packed full of vibrantly colorful side dishes.
"Huh? ...Umm, Kimiyoshi.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1130. Is this...?"
"I made my own lunch today, so I decided to make enough for you too, Akira-kun.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1321. If... if it's all right... would you like to eat some?"
"Y...yeah, of course!"
Akira-kun somewhat shyly raised his voice and nodded.
...When we first started getting to know each other, I thought his blunt way of speaking meant that he was uninterested.
But I now know that's not the case. ...He's just kind of an awkward person.
He's always trying really hard to give people the best answer, but he can't quite say it so he ends up going silent.
And now, I understand it clearly. He's a really serious and sincere person.
...That moment.
Not sure if it was good or bad timing, but Akira-kun's belly let out a growl.
As soon as he broke his concentration, his body started complaining to him for not eating lunch. ...It was loud enough that I could hear it standing next to him.
"...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1324.Ahaha."
"Ah, ahaha..."
Seeing me on the verge of bursting into laughter, Akira-kun shyly smiled and scratched his head.
It felt really tickling, but also strangely tightening.
That uncomfortable feeling made me feel happy. So happy...
...And really scared.
"Okay, Akira-kun, here's some tea..."
"Oh, thanks."
After accepting the cup of cold tea I just poured from the bottle, Akira-kun drank it down. I poured some more into a spare cup and took a sip.
I felt a comforting chill run down my throat, and for a moment the air in this sweaty room seemed to cool off.
"Anyway... Kimiyoshi, your cooking is really good."
"Ah, ahaha...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1327. About half of these side dishes are pre-made and frozen, though."
"But they're really tasty.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1138. My mom is no good at this stuff... so I'm really happy with this."
"Really?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1329. That's great..."
I put a hand on my chest and breathed a sigh of relief.
It's not that I wasn't confident, but I was worried he wouldn't like it... and it was nagging at me all day, so it made me all the more happy.
(Maybe I'll make him something again if I ever get the chance...)
Thinking about that, my heart swelled and began throbbing as I vowed to give it my best shot.
Next time, it won't be frozen food. I'll spend time preparing it the night before, and...
But... if I were to do that, there's no way I'd be able to keep it a secret from Mom like I did today.
I still haven't told my family about Akira-kun. I'm a little embarrassed about it, but... more than that, I was worried they'd complain about it or be outright opposed.
"It's too soon."
"Shouldn't you focus on your studies?"
I imagined them saying things that were more than just cautious, but bordering on critical... and felt depressed.
Still... if I want this to continue, I'll have to talk to my family and get their approval eventually.
I'm not doing anything wrong, but they'll probably be upset with me for "keeping secrets" and "acting selfishly" more than anything else.
It's stifling, but I have no choice. ...Because this is for the sake of my happiness.
Trying to shake off my unpleasant mood, I took a look at the freshly painted picture behind him.
Unlike usual, the subject of Akira-kun's painting this time was a portrait... of me.
To be honest, I was a little surprised and confused when he first asked, but I agreed to it after some encouragement from Chisato-chan and Tamako-chan.
But... at this point, I have no regrets. Because...
"What a lovely picture..."
As I gazed at the picture in awe, I let out a sigh while voicing my thoughts.

"I've... never modeled for a picture before, so I was really anxious and worried...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1335. Did I do okay?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1336. I didn't make things hard by moving around too much, did I?"
"No, not at all.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1141. You actually stayed still for a long time... It was a really big help."
"Really? ...Thank goodness."

"Plus, painting is different from taking a picture.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1143. You're not just trying to capture the shape of the model, but various elements like how they breathe, what they're looking at... You think about how you can best express those and how you'll illustrate it."
"So, while it can't capture realistic expressions the way photos and videos can, a painting can incorporate the artist's intent."
"I try to emphasize the features I liked best, creating the image as it appears in my mind...@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1146. It's a lot of fun."
"...That's amazing."
Akira-kun is usually very quiet, but he's very eloquent and passionate when it comes to painting. It's like he turns completely inside out when it comes to the things he likes.
"Huh?"

"When I look at this... it's a little embarrassing.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1341. I'm not nearly that pretty, but you drew me so beautifully.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1342. I'm happy... but it's complicated."
"That's not true.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1149. ...I just drew it as I saw it."
"...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1344.Thanks."
I was relieved to hear Akira-kun say that.
...And yet, why? Why do I feel guilty and uneasy about this?
Maybe because I was expecting Akira-kun to deny it...?

"Ah, ahaha.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1346. Even though I'm the model for this beautiful person, it would be really hard for a real person to be this beautiful.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1347. It's too beautiful... it might make me jealous, or feel a complex about it."
"...@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1151.But I still didn't manage to draw everything as I wanted.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1152. In fact, it's missing a little something."
"To tell you the truth... I drew this picture... to show everyone just how beautiful and amazing you are, Kimiyoshi."
"...But, in the end, it doesn't live up to the real thing.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1155. Maybe this is the best I can manage with my current abilities... It's disappointing when I think of it that way."
"Akira-kun..."
To think... that was how he felt.
How kind... But, do I even have the qualifications to make him think that?
"That's why, Kimiyoshi.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1157. ...I mean, Natsumi."

"From now on... um, I'd like to keep trying to draw you.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1159. I may not be able to do it right now, but I'll work hard so that someday I can show you a picture that will convince you."
"Would... would that be so bad...?"
"Th-that's not it...!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1353. I... I..."
...I was delighted.
I was so happy that Akira-kun thought so much of me.
But... happy as I am, why can't I control these unpleasant feelings making me want to doubt that...?
Just then, the music in the room stopped and the room fell silent.
It was the announcement that we had 10 minutes left before afternoon classes.
Akira-kun is in a scholarship program, so working on his assignments has priority over attending class this month... but that's not the case for me.
"I need to get going.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1356. Sorry."
"Oh, no. I'm the one who should apologize.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1162. After all, I used up your whole lunch break in the end..."
"No, don't worry about it.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1358. Because I had tons of fun."
I put on a bright smile as I slipped the lunch boxes into my bag.
Even though we didn't actually talk much... I was happy just watching Akira-kun earnestly work on his painting.
"By the way, Akira-kun.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1360. What are you planning to draw next?"

"Huh?@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1164. Right... my next assignment is a landscape painting.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1165. I was thinking it would be a nice change of pace to draw a countryside landscape this time."
"Countryside...?"

"Yeah.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1167. Fields and gardens, old buildings, that sort of thing...@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1168. Some place with a really nice view.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1169. ...Oh, that's right."
Then, Akira-kun clapped his hands together like he had thought of something in the middle of talking. And then,
"Natsumi, I'm sure you mentioned the town you lived in before... Okinomiya, in the Shishibone City area?"
"Huh?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1363. Y-yeah... what about it?"
"Then, are you aware@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1172. of a small settlement near that town called Hinamizawa?"
...Hinamizawa.
I gasped for a moment and nearly dropped the lunch boxes I was carrying.
Because I never imagined Akira-kun would ever mention that name.
"I learned about it a little while ago, when I was searching materials to find good sketching locations.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1174. Umm... here, look at this."
Akira-kun pulled a pamphlet from his bag as he said that, then spread it out.
It was a familiar-looking tourist brochure, issued by the town council... with information about sightseeing in Hinamizawa.

"This village is famous for its steep thatched-roof houses.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1176. And I hear there's a great view from the shrine at the top of a hill. You can see the entire village from there."
"What do you think about this town?@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1178. If you think it's a good place, then I'd love to go there."
"U-umm..."
I hesitated, struggling to find the words to respond.
It's not as though I didn't know about it. After all, the mayor of the village... or to be more precise, the town council leader, was a distant relative of mine.
But... what should I do?
Would it be all right to answer him honestly?
If he's asking me if I think it's a scenic location, I certainly do think that's true. It's abundantly rich in nature, and it would completely satisfy Akira-kun's desire to draw landscape paintings.
But, if he's asking me if I consider it a "good place"... I'm not sure how I'd answer that.
..."Oyashiro-sama."
Over the past few years, there has been a series of accidents and incidents in Hinamizawa with ties to that destructive god.
And the victims include... a boy, of roughly the same age as me.
"...Isn't that just foolish, baseless superstition?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1368. Ridiculous."
I didn't hesitate to say that because, honestly, I didn't believe in that stuff.
...But on the other hand, I also know that it's rooted in how I "don't want to believe."
And what's worse, what if I got Akira-kun involved in something like that...?
No, even if nothing happens, what if he ends up learning about this stuff...?
...Yeah, that's it.
Let's lie to him and say we don't really know. Then we'll do as much as possible to indirectly tell him he's better off not going.
With that in mind, I sifted through Hinamizawa's shortcomings, looking for a suitable excuse...
"...Huh?@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1180. The mayor of this village is named Kimiyoshi."
"Ahaha, what a coincidence.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1182. It's the same as you, Natsumi."
I gasped and looked at the brochure without thinking.
And what I saw there... was an unmistakable picture of my relative, with commentary.
And the name "Kiichirou Kimiyoshi" was written under the picture in furigana...

"Come to think of it, Chisato mentioned something about that...@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1184. Apparently a relative of yours is the mayor of some town.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1185. Could it be, this is him?"
"W-well..."
With it facing me directly... I was at a loss for how to respond.
I wanted to say it wasn't true.
I knew it would be fine to just say I don't know.
But... there's no way I can lie to the person I love.
With no other choice... I nodded my head.
"Aah, I thought so.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1188. Then you should know even more than what's in this brochure.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1189. If you don't mind, would you tell me more?"
"S-sure... I suppose."
Though I said that with a nod... a mountain of regrets were swirling around inside my heart.
...What should I do?
I can't just say "you're better off not going."
Akira-kun is a kind person. ...So if I say terrible things about the village where my relatives live, I'm sure he'll think less of me.

No, it would be fine if it was just that. But if he finds out there are creepy rumors about the village... and knows that I'm related to the mayor of such a weird place, what kind of impression would that give him of me?
Knowing him, I'm sure he wouldn't say anything even if it came to mind.
But... I worry that in the depths of his heart, he'd start to have strange doubts about me for being associated with that area.
In which case...

"...Oh, right!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1377. There's a festival in that village around the end of this month!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1378. It's called the Watanagashi festival... Would you like to go together?"
"Huh?@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1191. T...together?"
"Yeah!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1380. Is... is that no good...?"
"N-no... that's not it.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1193. I, uhh... I'd like to go, too.@k@vS14/39/VT4Bb_akira1194. And hopefully... together."
"...Yeah!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1382. Then I'll show you there!"
So, I'll pretend I don't know any of that stuff.
I don't know about Oyashiro-sama.
I haven't heard about the curse.
Because I lived in the next town over... so I only know the good things about the village.
(It'll be all right... It will.)
I did my best to convince myself of that.
There's no need to worry. Akira-kun couldn't possibly hear about those things on a one or two day trip.
And even if something like that starts to come up... I just have to stay by his side to stop it.
And, in the unlikely event that the "curse" does emerge, and tries to do him harm...
If that happens... I'll protect him.
No matter what happens, I'll protect him.
Even if demons or gods emerge, I don't care.
I'll destroy anything that comes between me and my happiness.
I swear it...!!
...That evening, I told my family about Akira-kun at dinner.
I said "I've started dating someone."
"Wow... really?@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1002. Come to think of it, you're about that age, Natsumi."
"So what kind of boy is he?@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuB1002. I hope he's a nice boy."

"Y-yeah... he's very kind.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1386. He got into a scholarship program for art, and he's won a lot of awards at big competitions.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1387. I even modeled for him earlier today..."
"That's impressive.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuF1002. I'd love to see how he drew you, Natsumi."
"E-ehehe..."
Surprisingly enough... the family didn't react poorly.
Of course, they warned me not to let my grades drop because of my relationship. I was expecting that.
But my grades on the recent mid-term went well, so even Mom was able to keep her sword sheathed.
"If you can bring your grades up, they'll be an effective weapon when it comes time to do something.@k@vS14/28/VT4Bb_tomoe1518. So, give it your all!"
(...Thanks, Tomoe-san.)
In my heart, I softly voiced my gratitude.
After all, she was the one who helped me make this happen.
"Also, umm..."
But, after that.
Even though I gave this conversation a lot of careful thought and succeeded in carrying it out... I slipped up and misspoke.
I said "I want to go to Hinamizawa with Akira-kun"...
"Going on a trip together...?"
In the middle of serving Dad his dinner, Mom very clearly frowned as soon as she heard that. Noticing that change in facial expression, I rushed to cover my mistake.

"N-not like that!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1392. We're all going to Hinamizawa on the day of Watanagashi, right?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1393. I was wondering if it would be okay for Akira-kun to come with us...?"
"Come with us...? But Dad's car can only fit four people, you know?@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1005. How is he going to get there?"
"W-well...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1395. Then Akira-kun and I can take the bus to Hinamizawa.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1396. There's a highway bus that heads there from Oumaki."
"No can do.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1007. That would be wasting money on bus fare, wouldn't it?@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1008. Doesn't it make more sense to meet up in Okinomiya?"
"Y-yeah, I guess..."
Mom's curt suggestion left me dissatisfied.
Sure, I suppose that would be fine... but I promised that I'd guide him there. And is it really so selfish to want to travel there and back together?
"What does this boy even want with Hinamizawa?"

"Didn't I already tell you?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1399. Akira-kun is an art student. He wants to paint a country landscape for his next assignment.@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1400. So I was planning to show him around Hinamizawa..."
And even if I'm just showing him around, it's a small village after all. The villagers are likely to notice him, so I definitely need my parents' consent.
But... Mom didn't seem to like the idea at all.
"Then I'll introduce him to some good people I know, and you can leave it to them.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1011. The two of you can go around together, but it can't be just the two of you alone."
"Wh-why...?"

"Isn't it obvious?@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1013. Imagine it... some outsider girl traveling around with a boy. You know what kind of rumors the villagers would spread...?@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1014. I'll never allow it!"
"N-no way..."
I was discouraged and at a loss for words... But on the other hand, somehow... I expected Mom to be opposed.
Even in the best of times, she's one to worry about appearances and reputation. I'm sure she just doesn't want any weird rumors going around in the village.
...But I absolutely refuse to have someone babysitting Akira-kun and me.
Because the whole point of me leading him around the village is to prevent him from hearing any of those strange rumors.
On the off chance that the person with us brings up a weird topic... doesn't that defeat the purpose of the whole thing?
And then, just as I began putting together the words to persuade her...
Another annoying obstacle came in from an unexpected direction.
"...Natsumi-chan.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuB1004. You invited this... Toudou-kun boy to come on the day of Watanagashi?"
"Huh?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1404. Y-yeah... that was the plan."
And if he's there for the village festival, he'll have no trouble finding things to paint.
That's what I thought, but... I never expected it to make Grandma put up this sort of resistance.
"...I'm sorry Natsumi-chan, but Grandma is opposed too.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuB1006. It would be a major problem if inviting someone on the day of Watanagashi were to invoke Oyashiro-sama's wrath."
"And the curse may not befall just the boy, but you too, Natsumi-chan..."
"Oyashiro-sama again?@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1017. Please, enough of that."
Mom was clinging to her head in frustration, and her ill-tempered voice was getting even worse.
...This can't get any worse. Once Mom gets like this, there's no way she'll listen to me. After all, Mom doesn't just disbelieve, she outright despises the faith in Oyashiro-sama.
(You just had to say it...!)
My irritation turned to anger, and without thinking I began glaring at Grandma.
The curse, the curse... Why does she have to mention something that will ruin the atmosphere here?!

"The curse...? Isn't that a weird thing to say?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1407. Because plenty of our neighbors go to the festival, don't they?!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1408. So why would the curse fall on Akira-kun specifically?!"
"...Oyashiro-sama punishes those who bring trouble to the village.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuB1009. I don't know what sort of boy he is, but the villagers don't feel good about outsiders coming inside."
"Don't say it like that!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1410. Akira-kun is a kind person!"
"But, Natsumi-chan..."
"Please stop this, Mother!@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1019. The curse, the curse... Don't make things more complicated by bringing up weird things!"
After loudly interrupting, Mom turned to me and spoke.
...When I saw the look on her face, I felt dejected. No matter how hard I thought about it, there's no good answer when she looks like that.
"Listen, Natsumi.@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1021. If you suggested showing around those girls you're always hanging out with, I wouldn't say anything against that."
"But, do you know what the villagers are going to say when they see you going around with a male classmate?@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1023. They'll say you're a slut, you know?"
"A slut? What?!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1412. I'm not thinking anything like that!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1413. Mom, you're the one being weird by looking too deep into it!!"
"What? How can you talk to me that way?!@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1025. ...Honey?@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1026. Say something too!"
"Y-yeah..."
Dad deliberately stretched out his chopsticks to start eating, and muttered that word without any concern.
...He's really so unreliable at times like these.
Besides, if you're going to call male/female relations slutty... isn't that how I was born? Are you going to say I'm a product of something unclean?!
"Plus, it's fine for you to have a special someone, but if you get so absorbed by him that your grades start slipping, I won't allow it!"
"You did good on the mid-terms, but isn't it getting close to finals?@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1029. Are you prepared for them?@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1030. Besides..."
"Enough!@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1415. I'm done eating!"
"Ah, wait, Natsumi!@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1032. I'm still talking to you..."
I didn't need to hear any more.
I violently rose to my feet then rushed out of the living room. And then, I could hear Mom scolding me from behind as I dashed up the stairs.
"Natsumi!@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1034. Make sure you take your after dinner medicine, all right?@k@vS14/00/VT4Bb_natsuM1035. I know you're listening, Natsumi!!"
"...What's with this? What's with this...?!"
I harshly slammed the door closed, then muttered in anger as I threw my body onto my bed.
I slapped my open hand on the pillow in front of me, but felt even more upset when it softly collapsed without any resistance.
"Why did you say that...? Why did you have to say it like that...?!"
...Up until now, I've been doing my best to follow along with what my parents have told me.
Like my studies. My grades have improved so much that my teacher is praising me. And even at my part-time job, everyone tells me I'm very diligent, and a good girl.
My friends can see that. People who understand me see that. My boyfriend can see that.
Everyone, everyone is able to see how desperately hard I've been working to adapt to my new environment, and that I'm seeing good results.
...And yet, all the adults in my family are acting the same as always.
Mom is nagging.
Dad is unreliable.
Grandma is gloomy and oppressive.
Why...? Why is my family so dull and incapable of understanding?!
Doubting me, making false accusations, ordering me around, restricting me...!
Why can't they accept me?
Even though I've been working so hard, why can't they believe it?
Tomoe-san told me that as long as I'm trying my best, people will be willing to listen to me.
But... just how hard do I have to work to get them to understand?
When can I finally relax?
The more I think about it, the more irritated and angry I get.
I got up and grabbed the pill case on my desk, then tossed a capsule inside my mouth. Then I poured some water into a glass from the pitcher beside it, and drank it all at once.
"...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1421.Gulp..."
After taking the medicine... I felt relieved, and began to calm down. I wonder if that's the active effect or just a placebo?
And after a while I felt a rush of drowsiness, like a fine mist inside my head... and a yawn escaped me.
"...@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1423.I'll just go to bed."

I was actually planning to do some preparation for school tomorrow before taking my pill and going to bed. ...But it was far too much of a bother, so I tossed my clothes to the floor, put on my pajamas, and crawled into bed.
The warm cottony feel wrapped around my body, mellowing me into a world of slumber...
"But... we'll see each other again tomorrow morning..."
This is Mom we're talking about. If I don't apologize, she'll probably still be in a bad mood preparing breakfast tomorrow, and she'll do the bare minimum as a mother and say "good morning" to me.
...But even if I apologize then, it won't do much to fix her mood.
So, I'll force my unsatisfying breakfast down with a glass of milk or something and then head to school feeling depressed.
Thinking about that... made me feel miserable.
How much easier would things be if we just didn't have to see each other face to face...?
...Then, what if you killed her?
I jumped out of bed and took a look around.
Who was that...?
What was that voice just now...?
Ahahaha.
...Where are you looking, Natsumi?
I'm right here.
"Wh...where?@k@vS14/36/VT4Bb_natsu1427. Where is that voice coming from?"
Hehe...
You're hopeless.
Take a quick look in the mirror next to your bed.
Please, give it a look.
Go on...
Feeling scared, I reached out and grabbed the mirror on my desk.
And... I gazed at my face in that small frame...
My whole body was wrapped in fear so intense that it even froze my scream in my throat.
What I saw reflected there... wasn't my face.
It was something more dreadful, hideous... and horrendously deformed...!!
Intense nausea came rising up from the back of my throat, and I crouched down on the spot.
...It felt like "it" was grinning at me from the other side of the mirror, so I immediately tossed the mirror away.
The mirror shattered to pieces as it slammed into the wall, scattering shards all around.
"Haah, haah, haah...!!"
...Hehe.
Ehehehehehe.
Ahahahahahahaha...
Nevertheless, the laughter continued echoing from the pile of debris.
I tried to control my hoarse breathing, but my heart started beating more intensely and my field of view was narrowing, filled with bizarre colors swirling all around.
...Admit it, Natsumi.
The truth is, you're not a good girl.
You're a wicked girl that constantly changes your attitude based on other people's reactions...
You act like a lovable airhead... but deep in your heart, you're thinking other thoughts, aren't you...?
Just like today?
When Akira-kun showed you the picture, you deliberately tried to force him to call you beautiful.
You knew, didn't you?
You understood, didn't you?
Akira-kun is a nice guy, so regardless of what he might think he'd never say anything negative about you...
"S-stop it!!"
Then I'll show you.
Your true form... and your true wish...
"Hey Natsumi, your Mom is thinking of you and looking out for you, right? Because you, too, are a daughter of the Kimiyoshi family... Hey, are you even listening? Natsumi?!"
Right then... suddenly.
My racing emotions and shattering heart suddenly became colorless, transparent... The thoughts in my head cleared up.
I wasn't angry. I wasn't afraid. Sorrow, suffering, guilt, gratitude, despair... I felt none of them.
Everything intricately mixed together... the vectors in my mind coalesced on one thing.
...Who?
Who asked me to be a part of this family?
When did you ask me to become a member of the Kimiyoshi family?
Do you seriously believe I would have wanted to be born a Hinamizawan?!
...Tap.
I've suffered excruciating hardship since I came to this city, thanks to being born and raised in the countryside.
...Tap, tap.
And thanks to that great disaster, I've had to keep secrets I didn't need to bear and make great efforts to maintain them to hide my connection to those freaks.
...Tap, tap, tap...
There's nothing for it. ...I was trying so hard, but Hinamizawa ruined everything...!
The Three Families? Oyashiro-sama? The curse? Like I care about any of that!
Hinamizawa hasn't given me anything. ...It gave me that horrible disaster, that's it!!
If only I wasn't from Hinamizawa! I'd be treating everyone normally, without having to bear all these inferiority complexes and obligations!!
I'd be playing with my friends like normal! Struggling to improve my grades like normal!! And finding a person to fall in love with, like normal!!!
It's all Hinamizawa's fault!! My happiness, efforts, and dreams have all gone up in smoke because I grew up in that wretched place!!
"......If that's the case...!!"
If that's the case... I don't need this anymore!!
It should all go away!! Disappeeeeeeeeear!!
"...Natsumi? Where do you think you're going? I was still talking to... Eek?!"
"S-stop it, Natsumi! What are you thinking!?! S-s-st-stooooop!!"
"Haruko? What's wrong? I heard a weird scream... E-eeeeek?!"
"I'm home. ...Huh? What's this smell? Heeey, Haru..."
"H-H-Haruko?! Wh-what the...? G-gyaaaaah!!!"
That's right.
Why do I alone have to endure this?
Why do I have to live this stifling lifestyle, doing as those people say?
I'm doing my best here.
And they're selfishly living their lives as they see fit.
In that case, I'll do the same...
I'll go on with my life however I see fit!!!
Ahahahahahaha!
Aahahahahahahahaha!!
Yes, kill them! Kill them!
The people you hate! The ones that get in the way of your happiness!!
Kill them... Kill them all!!
...Yes, kill.
Kill, kill, killkillkillkillkillkillkillkillkillkillkillkillkillkillkillkillkill!!!
Ahahahahahahahahahahahaha, gugyagoborogahigagugegegegegegegegegege!!!
